note:
```json
{
  "observed_steps_with_evidence": [
    "A sterile fenestrated surgical drape is placed over the animal, covering most of its body, leaving a small opening for the surgical site.",
    "Serrated forceps are used to pinch and lift the skin at the fourth nipple area, preparing for the incision.",
    "Scissors are used to make a 1 cm parasagittal incision from the fourth nipple toward the head, with the blunt tips of the scissors facing down.",
    "A cotton tip applicator is used to separate the skin from the peritoneum on the medial side of the incision.",
    "The mammary fat pad is gently peeled away from the skin using a tool.",
    "A sterile 27-gauge needle is used to secure the skin near the animal's body.",
    "Serrated forceps are used to gently extend the fat pad away from the body.",
    "The inguinal lymph node at the intersection of major vessels is located, and the medial vessels and adjoining fat are cauterized."
  ],
  "salient_objects_or_text": [
    "Sterile fenestrated surgical drape",
    "Serrated forceps",
    "Scissors",
    "Cotton tip applicator",
    "Mammary fat pad",
    "Sterile 27-gauge needle",
    "Cauterization tool"
  ]
}
```
